    Index

    A B C D E F G H I L M N O P R S T U V W 
    Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen|Alle Packages|Serialisierte Form

    T

    targetId - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.ConflictResponse
    ID of the second conflicting automation.
    targetKind - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.ConflictResponse
    Kind of the second automation.
    targetLevel - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.SceneDeviceStateRequest
    Target numeric level.
    targetLevel - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.SceneDeviceStateResponse
    Target analog level, or null to skip.
    targetLevel - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.SceneDeviceState
    Target numeric level (brightness %, temperature, sensor value, blind %).
    targetName - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.ConflictResponse
    Name of the second conflicting automation.
    targetSwitchedOn - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.SceneDeviceStateRequest
    Target on/off state for SWITCH.
    targetSwitchedOn - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.SceneDeviceStateResponse
    Target on/off state for SWITCH devices, or null to skip.
    targetSwitchedOn - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.SceneDeviceState
    Target on/off state for SWITCH devices.
    temporaryPassword - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.InviteRequest
    Initial temporary password assigned to the invited account.
    THERMOSTAT - Enum-Konstante in Enum-Klasse at.jku.se.entity.enums.DeviceType
    Thermostat.
    THRESHOLD - Enum-Konstante in Enum-Klasse at.jku.se.entity.enums.TriggerType
    Fires when a sensor value crosses a defined threshold.
    TIME_BASED - Enum-Konstante in Enum-Klasse at.jku.se.entity.enums.TriggerType
    Fires at a specific time or on a recurring schedule.
    timestamp - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.EnergyLogRequest
    Timestamp of the measurement.
    timestamp - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.ActivityLogResponse
    Timestamp when the action occurred.
    timestamp - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.EnergyLogResponse
    Timestamp the measurement was recorded.
    timestamp - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.ActivityLog
    When the state change occurred.
    timestamp - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.EnergyLog
    When this record was captured.
    timestamp() - Methode in Datensatzklasse at.jku.se.iot.DeviceEvent
    Gibt den Wert für die Datensatzkomponente timestamp zurück.
    todayWh - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.EnergyDashboardResponse.DeviceEnergySummary
    Today's consumption in watt-hours.
    todayWh - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.EnergyDashboardResponse.RoomEnergySummary
    Today's consumption in watt-hours.
    toResponse(ActivityLog) - Statische Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.mapper.ActivityLogMapper
    Converts an ActivityLog entity to an ActivityLogResponse DTO.
    toResponse(Device) - Statische Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.mapper.DeviceMapper
    Converts a Device entity to a DeviceResponse DTO including current state.
    toResponse(EnergyLog) - Statische Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.mapper.EnergyLogMapper
    Converts an EnergyLog entity to an EnergyLogResponse DTO.
    toResponse(Notification) - Statische Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.mapper.NotificationMapper
    Converts a Notification entity to a NotificationResponse DTO.
    toResponse(Room) - Statische Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.mapper.RoomMapper
    Converts a Room entity to a RoomResponse DTO.
    toResponse(Rule) - Statische Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.mapper.RuleMapper
    Converts a Rule entity to a RuleResponse DTO.
    toResponse(Scene) - Statische Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.mapper.SceneMapper
    Converts a Scene entity to a SceneResponse DTO including all device states.
    toResponse(Schedule) - Statische Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.mapper.ScheduleMapper
    Converts a Schedule entity to a ScheduleResponse DTO.
    toResponse(User) - Statische Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.mapper.UserMapper
    Converts a User entity to a UserResponse DTO (password hash is never included).
    toResponse(VacationMode) - Statische Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.mapper.VacationModeMapper
    Converts a VacationMode entity to a VacationModeResponse DTO.
    toString() - Methode in Datensatzklasse at.jku.se.iot.DeviceCommand
    Gibt eine Zeichenfolgendarstellung dieser Datensatzklasse zurück.
    toString() - Methode in Datensatzklasse at.jku.se.iot.DeviceEvent
    Gibt eine Zeichenfolgendarstellung dieser Datensatzklasse zurück.
    toString() - Methode in Datensatzklasse at.jku.se.websocket.DeviceEventBroadcaster.DeviceStateMessage
    Gibt eine Zeichenfolgendarstellung dieser Datensatzklasse zurück.
    totalTodayWh - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.EnergyDashboardResponse
    Household total consumption today in watt-hours.
    totalWeekWh - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.EnergyDashboardResponse
    Household total consumption for the current week in watt-hours.
    triggerCondition - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.RuleRequest
    Cron expression for TIME_BASED, or a human-readable description for THRESHOLD/EVENT.
    triggerCondition - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.RuleResponse
    Textual trigger condition (e.g., cron expression or description).
    triggerCondition - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.Rule
    Textual description or cron expression of the trigger condition.
    triggerDevice - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.Rule
    The device whose state or value is monitored for THRESHOLD and EVENT triggers.
    triggerDeviceId - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.RuleRequest
    For THRESHOLD and EVENT: the device being monitored.
    triggerDeviceId - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.RuleResponse
    Identifier of the device being monitored, or null for TIME_BASED.
    triggerDeviceName - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.RuleResponse
    Name of the device being monitored, or null for TIME_BASED.
    triggerThresholdValue - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.RuleRequest
    For THRESHOLD: the numeric threshold value that fires the rule.
    triggerThresholdValue - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.RuleResponse
    Numeric threshold value for THRESHOLD triggers.
    triggerThresholdValue - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.Rule
    The numeric value that triggers the rule for THRESHOLD type (e.g., temperature below 18.0 °C).
    triggerType - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.RuleRequest
    How the rule is triggered (TIME_BASED, THRESHOLD, EVENT).
    triggerType - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.RuleResponse
    Trigger category (TIME_BASED, THRESHOLD, EVENT).
    triggerType - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.Rule
    How the rule is triggered (FR-11).
    TriggerType - Enum-Klasse in at.jku.se.entity.enums
    The three supported trigger types for automation rules (FR-11).
    type - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.DeviceCreateRequest
    Device category (SWITCH, DIMMER, THERMOSTAT, SENSOR, BLIND).
    type - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.DeviceResponse
    Device category (SWITCH, DIMMER, THERMOSTAT, SENSOR, BLIND).
    type - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.Device
    Functional type of the device (determines which state fields are used).
    type() - Methode in Datensatzklasse at.jku.se.websocket.DeviceEventBroadcaster.DeviceStateMessage
    Gibt den Wert für die Datensatzkomponente type zurück.
    A B C D E F G H I L M N O P R S T U V W 
    Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen|Alle Packages|Serialisierte Form
